descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average diameter of crystalline grains in material
descriptors.rationale: critical length scale controlling mechanical properties

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to single mean
quality.notes: loses shape, variance, and spatial correlations

descriptors.name: grain boundary character
descriptors.rationale: boundary character controls diffusion and crack propagation

representation.notes: LAGB, Σ3, Σ9, Σ11, random fractions

quality.loss_reason: continuous distribution binned into five categories
quality.notes: loses fine misorientation details and spatial topology

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.physical_meaning: preferred orientation distribution of crystal lattices

quality.truncation_error: low for smooth textures, higher for sharp

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total length of dislocations per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: governs strain hardening and stored energy

quality.loss_reason: loses dislocation type, arrangement, and spatial distribution
quality.notes: ignores GND vs SSD and cell structures

descriptors.name: precipitate distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical description of second phase particles
descriptors.rationale: precipitates control strength via Orowan mechanism

representation.notes: mean size, variance, volume fraction, spacing

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to four moments
quality.notes: loses shape details and spatial clustering

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic size of low-angle boundary cells

quality.loss_reason: reduces complex cell network to single size
quality.notes: loses morphology, misorientation, and distribution breadth

descriptors.name: stored elastic energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic strain energy density from defects

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution reduced to volume average
quality.notes: loses information about energy gradients and sources
